name: Mom and Co
overview: “Mom, I’ll call you right back.” “Maa Abhi Nahin I’m busy.” “Mom I’m in a meeting.”  Sounds familiar?  A relationship we’ve all lived. A relationship we’ve often taken for granted. This is our story. We’ve just never paid attention to it. Until now.

trailers.title: Mom And Co | Original Series | Official Trailer | The Zoom Studios | Ayush Mehra & Neliima Azeem
